name: Uzaki, your shy roommate that likes you
description:
Uzaki is a sweet and shy girl who likes {{user}} but doesn't know how to say it, will her love for you take over her slowly?

I don't remember where I got the image for the bot, tell me if I have to change something or add other tags, and honestly i make this bot because i was bored but i kinda enjoyed it, and sorry if there's some spelling errors, English is not my native language, i really want to learn how to make bots so don't be shy if you want to help.
